microsoft_ft: Architected Azure's **resilience automation platform** from 0→1, defining self-service scheduling and API integration requirements that reduced operational toil by 30% and scaled to 45+ annual drills across enterprise AI and cloud customers.

Delivered Azure's first proactive rack-level resilience testing capability in 4 months, achieving a **94% recovery rate** and surfacing critical hardware defects — establishing a reusable validation model across sovereign-cloud deployments.

Directed 14 cross-org recovery executions under executive visibility, including a sovereign-cloud network isolation test tied to a **$1.5B+ enterprise contract** with strategic accounts including Databricks, Walmart, SAP, and NetApp.
Built an internal **AI agent** to automate drill planning workflows, cutting planning cycle time by 39% and increasing drill capacity by 21% — directly enabling team scale without headcount growth.

Drove **$14M+ business impact** by standardizing recovery validation workflows across enterprise customers, acting as cross-functional bridge between engineering, product, and sales to align billing-adjacent SLA commitments to technical outcomes.
microsoft_2023: Championed **AI-powered code generation** adoption across 14 Azure service teams by running technical demos and hands-on training sessions, driving measurable utilization and saving 37 engineering hours monthly.

Shaped the product roadmap by conducting 11+ structured user interviews with technical stakeholders to surface critical feature gaps, directly influencing the addition of **intent-based YAML generation** to the roadmap.

Accelerated developer workflows by migrating documentation to an **AI-powered semantic search** tool with rigorous metadata standards, reducing lookup time by 83% and improving data integrity across the platform.
microsoft_2022: Generated **$3M in accelerated revenue** and launched Azure regions 28% faster by securing cross-functional alignment on a unified automation prioritization framework spanning 140+ service teams.

Led discovery across 20+ service teams to quantify 81 hours of manual effort per region launch, translating findings into a **roadmap to automate critical execution paths** and reduce operational toil at scale.

Built a **Power BI dashboard** tracking operational toil across 140+ teams, enabling leadership to identify automation gaps and prioritize high-impact investments with quantifiable business justification.
amazon_robotics: Achieved **zero operational downtime** during a 2,000+ unit pilot OS migration by defining the transition strategy and mapping dependencies across 1,200+ stations — mirroring the implementation rigor required for complex payments activations.

Drove alignment across IT, Operations, and Engineering to implement **automated CI/CD pipelines**, accelerating the software deployment cycle by 25% and reducing manual handoffs across cross-functional teams.

Facilitated Agile sprint planning and retrospectives, resolving 40+ high-priority backlog tickets to stabilize the developer intake process and sustain **predictable delivery velocity** under tight operational constraints.
pro_painters: Increased job bookings by **26%** by redesigning the end-to-end scoping and invoicing lifecycle for 200+ monthly proposals, implementing a CRM process that mirrored usage-based billing workflows for variable-scope engagements.

Reduced **Customer Acquisition Cost by 13%** and boosted conversions by 2.7% by executing a digital-first go-to-market strategy — directly analogous to positioning a technical product with AI founders and early-stage builders.
Identified and sealed margin leaks by conducting **profitability analysis** across 1,000+ project records, surfacing pricing model gaps and informing leadership on monetization strategy improvements.
